title: Gaga decurrens
intro: Gaga decurrens, also known as Chrysanthemum decurrens, is a flowering plant species in the daisy family that is native to China and Korea. The health benefits of Gaga decurrens include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, sore throat, and digestive issues. The bioactive constituents of this plant include flavonoids, such as quercetin and kaempferol, as well as triterpenoids like ursolic acid, which contribute to its medicinal properties. Gaga decurrens is commonly used in traditional medicine and is often prepared as a tea, extract, or tincture to take advantage of its health benefits.
